steps.title: Notice the added reason
steps.content: The first sentence gives one reason Hilo soil is a fitting state soil: it is abundant across Hawaii. The next sentence gives another supporting reason: it is important to agriculture and grows crops such as sweet potatoes and taro.

steps.title: Pick an addition transition
steps.content: Choice A signals an alternative, Choice B signals contrast, and Choice C signals time. The two sentences do not oppose each other or shift in time; the second adds another reason supporting the same point. The answer is D.
